/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/calibrate_camera.dir/calibrate_camera.cpp.o -o calibrate_camera  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_highgui.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_aruco.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_objdetect.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/librealsense2.2.57.7.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_videoio.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_calib3d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_features2d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_flann.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_dnn.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/librsutils.a
